articles.title: The Benefits Of Cognitive Inclusion In UX Research
articles.summary: Findings from an exploratory user research study highlighting the unique insights and practical UX recommendations shared by participants with cognitive disabilities.

articles.title: The Impact Of Humanoid Robots On Humanity
articles.summary: We have officially moved past the era of humanoid robots as mere public relations stunts. As they become increasingly lifelike, society may soon face profound social, psychological, and ethical challenges. What happens when the boundary between humans and machines becomes almost impossible to distinguish?

articles.title: How artists created Star Wars: Maul – Shadow Lord's gritty, painterly aesthetic
articles.summary: Art director Andre Kirk talks us through the process of designing Maul’s body and costume.

A practical method for setting how much an AI does on its own, plus six control patterns for human oversight.
